# Black Founders Hub

> A platform connecting Black Women Founders with verified mentors, grant opportunities, and a community that gets it.

Black Founders Hub helps Black women and nonbinary founders close the funding and opportunity gap through mentor matching, a curated grant directory, and a founder community.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of mentors, grants, and community.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories, playbooks, and lessons for Black women founders.
- [Sign in](/auth): Join the hub as a founder or mentor.
